Name: EASTMAN Impact Wrench 1 2 Inch 450W Torque Gun 280 Nm Max Includes 4 Sockets 1900 RPM Speed Ideal Car Tyre Changing DIY
Description: RELIABLE 450W ELECTRIC MOTOR: This corded impact wrench runs on a powerful 450W Rated Input Power motor, providing consistent performance without the need for an air compressor. Simply plug into a standard 220-240 V outlet for immediate high-torque fastening application. OPTIMIZED TORQUE & SPEED: Designed for efficiency, the tool delivers a versatile Torque range of 80-280 Nm. With a No Load Speed of 1700-1900 RPM, it provides the rapid rotational force necessary to loosen lug nuts and drive heavy bolts quickly. COMPLETE READY-TO-USE KIT: Unlike many bare tools, the EIW-280 offers incredible value by including a Free Set of 4 Impact Sockets in sizes 17, 19, 21, and 24 mm. This ensures you have the most common sizes needed for automotive wheel changes right out of the box. STANDARD 1/2 INCH DRIVE: The tool features a robust (12.7mm) 1/2 Inch Drive anvil, the industry standard for automotive and construction sockets.
